differential_diagnoses: Neurolymphomatosis or leptomeningeal involvement of DLBCL
next_steps: CSF testing for Powassan virus (PCR and IgM), JC virus (PCR), VZV (PCR), and HHV-6 (PCR)
CSF cytology and flow cytometry repeat with broad lymphoid marker panel
Brain biopsy (stereotactic) if non-invasive testing remains unrevealing and clinical decline continues
Full-body PET/CT to evaluate for systemic relapse of lymphoma
